name: The Reason Why He Fell in Love with Me
overview: New math teacher Hikawa charms everyone, including Akagi, his assistant. But a stolen kiss and a student witness complicate their growing tension.

trailers.title: So happy to see Toru come to his terms with Ryo in "The Reason Why he Fell in Love with Me" S2🥰
I'd like to wake up like this in Japanese BL "The Reason Why he Fell in Love with Me" S2 😘
